summary: iOS 🟥 ANC | Settings for Transparency mode are not properly applied/saved
scenario: Transparency Mode sub-setting (Environment/Speech) reverts to default when switching between modes on Voyager Surround 80 UC, Free 60+ UC, and Free 20
description_clean: Settings for Transparency mode (Environment and Speech sub-settings) are not properly applied or saved. When the user sets Transparency to Environment, closes settings, then reopens and sets it to Speech (or vice versa), the setting reverts to a default instead of saving the selected option. Affected devices: Poly Voyager Surround 80 UC (reverts to Speech), Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC (reverts to Environment), Poly Voyager Free 20 (reverts to Environment).
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected device (e.g., Poly Voyager Surround 80 UC).
3. Go to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
5. Close the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe away or press Home).
6. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Navigate back to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
8. Observe the current Transparency Mode setting.
9. Change the Transparency Mode setting to 'Speech'.
10. Close the Poly Studio Mobile app again.
11. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
12. Navigate back to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
13. Observe the current Transparency Mode setting.
expected: The Transparency Mode setting should persist and reflect the last user-selected option (e.g., 'Environment' or 'Speech') after closing and reopening the app.
actual: The Transparency Mode setting reverts to a default value instead of saving the selected option. Poly Voyager Surround 80 UC reverts to 'Speech', Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC reverts to 'Environment', Poly Voyager Free 20 reverts to 'Environment'.
